title: User-supplied URL in fetch()
description: Server fetches a URL provided by the user without validation.
remediation: Validate URL against allowlist of approved domains

title: Open redirect via user-supplied URL
description: Redirect to user-supplied URL without validation.
remediation: Validate redirect URL is relative or on same domain

title: No blocking of cloud metadata endpoints
description: Cloud metadata IP/hostname detected in code. Ensure SSRF protections block access.
remediation: Block requests to 169.254.169.254 and cloud metadata endpoints in URL validation
